name: Heroes Over Europe
post_apply_message:
Heroes Over Europe (2009, non-Steam, cracked/abandonware) — Apply AUTO-ADDS the Steam shortcut (heroes2.exe, game folder as start dir, a stable computed appid, GE-Proton 10.34). Steam closes briefly to write it; stage GE first with 'gfm stage-runner'. Then just run it. If you get missing-DLL errors, install everything in the game's _Redist folder (per Chemical's _HOW TO PLAY readme). No backed-up prefix for this one, so the appid is derived from the recipe id (stable across re-applies).

CONTROLLER: native (best with Xbox 360). On the Deck/Legion just enable Steam Input (Gamepad layout + Xbox config support) — the pad presents as a 360 controller and the game accepts it directly, same as Heroes of the Pacific. x360ce is the fallback.

RESOLUTION (manual, done once on the Deck — path A): the game's own graphicssettings.exe config tool is BROKEN on stock copies ('string not localised') because it looks for gfxsettings/en/ but the shipped folder is 'english'. Fix: (1) in graphicssettings.exe, hex-replace the string 'gfxsettings/%s/gfxsettingstool.csv' -> 'gfxsettings/en/gfxsettingstool.csv' (%s->en, same length); (2) rename gfxsettings/english -> gfxsettings/en (lowercase, Linux is case-sensitive and the exe string is lowercase); then run graphicssettings.exe under the game's Proton prefix and pick 1920x1200. It writes GraphicsSettings.ini in the game folder. Ref: steamcommunity app/33260 'Fix config setup'.
notes:
Built 2026-07-10 from the SD scan (exe heroes2.exe at root; Chemical crack, readme '_HOW TO PLAY!!.txt' = 'launch Heros2.exe, install _Redist for DLL errors'). Not in the gospel registry (no old backup), so steam_shortcut derives a stable appid from the recipe id. Also on the SD: graphicssettings.exe (config) + gu.exe. Not to be confused with Heroes of the Pacific (separate flight game, needs an ASI widescreen fix).

RESOLUTION/CONTROLLER research 2026-07-13: game files are SD-only (not mirrored to Windows), so GraphicsSettings.ini couldn't be read from the dev box to pre-bake a preset. Per PCGW (Heroes_Over_Europe) the game has native widescreen + AA up to 4x + native controller support; config is GraphicsSettings.ini in the game folder, written by graphicssettings.exe. KNOWN BUG (steamcommunity app/33260 'Fix config setup'): graphicssettings.exe errors 'string not localised' out of the box — fix = hex-edit 'gfxsettings/%s/gfxsettingstool.csv'->'.../en/...' + rename gfxsettings/english->en (case-sensitive on Linux). Tony chose path A (apply the fix manually on the Deck once, set 1920x1200). Path B (GFM auto-restore via symlink en->english + pre-patched tool payload + GraphicsSettings.ini preset) is deferred until he exposes the game folder to Syncthing. Latest official patch is 1.01.
